item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Doing mental gymnastics to ignore poverty.
item.dc:creator: Othagovna

item.title: Dad pride post
item.description:
This is a chat between me, my eldest daughter (blue) who lives with her mother, and my wife (red) FP Edit - Thanks for all the kind words and reassurance. I’m sorry to hear so many of you didn’t have the same ‘coming out’ experience. Sadly highlighting why there’s still a reason for Pride Month.
We live 300 miles apart so the old WhatsApp chat is a good way to keep up to speed with each other
Did I handle this Ok? I’m sure she knows me well enough to know I’m a clown bastard. I don’t care who she loves so long as they treat her as she deserves <3
item.dc:creator: dundeeisdrunk

item.title: Teeny tiny itty bitty octopus
item.description: So, obviously as soon as I came across this video I had to grab it to share with you all - but mostly for @TinyOctopus of course. Had to split it into three parts due to its length, but it's worth it to see the little guy giving a big ol' finger hug at the end. Enjoy! (Sauce: https://www.instagram.com/reel/C8FVzoApohT/)
item.dc:creator: MizWeirdo

item.title: Why student debt exists.
item.description:
My brother is waiting to see what happens to his student loan debt. He's really sweating it; even if only $10K was forgiven, it would lighten his load.
I admit that this is nearly a year old, but it still seems relevant to me.
(originally posted by @UncleMartha in r/NewsWithJingjing on 2023-06-29 10:59:07)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: An actual phone vid dump (misc.)
item.description:
Eggggggggggg
Dunno if Imgur works anymore but for more of Ian McConnell I just got smashed and watched his "Season 1" stand up and it gave me hope, sadness, and like if ahh n/m anyways https://youtu.be/7vV952XKJWg?si=6nCeo-ROKRtB3psv I think is the full. Also This isn't a fucking thing! It's literally me trying to store favorites off my phone on this file server... so I guess whatever but I half inched half these favorites from Lady abbatha stabbatha's dumps so leave me alone and ask her!

item.dc:creator: Boxzsak

item.title: Meme dump to get you trough Friday #249 (hang in there, weekend is coming soon)
item.description:
1. Cleva girl
2. Apparently in this sport you can kick start fighting whenever you want
3. What magic is this
4
5. Do not be like these people
6
7
8. We ve been tricked
9
10. That was the coolest thing ever
11
12
13
14
15. Thank you for making it to the end of this dump, I hope you were thoroughly entertained! I would like to share with you that I'm making a wacky game called Do Not Press The Button, and it's tone and style are kind of inspired by the Stanley Parable. Here is an inspiration quote within the game! If you liked the humor in this dump, you would probably like the game. Please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Have a happy weekend, gang!

item.title: This better not be fake news!
item.description: My heart still goes out to the families. Their hearts will be torn open again by this case, but hopefully in the end some semblance of closure on one end will be felt. It will never fill the empty void though. I just hope this case doesn’t turn into a travesty of justice.

item.dc:creator: ElbowDeepInAHorse

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1257 (panic at the other places)
item.description:
It's a morning! I'm alive! My dinosaur and I will become problems to the rest of the world. Let us take this bread by force.
Oh, the Pyle guide to birds. As incomprehensible as the OT and the Silmarillion.
They're about to explode into the music scene.
Just. Uh. Not future reference at ALL. Nope.
My favorite sort of dates.
Barbarism isn't exclusive to barbarians.
Fucking furniture.
It really is.
I like my women like I like my art: Neolithicc.
Ngl, I want this.
I remember wondering why my hummingbird feeders were going empty at night when I lived in Bisbee. Then one night I stayed outside and BATS EVERYWHERE and I never felt more goth. I mean, I was feeding wild bats and living inside a building there was an old brothel. What more Old Western Vampire lair is there?
I bet one of these was @SecretHarpy. I'm not mad, just disappointed I wasn't invited.
I remember when I accidentally taught my 6 year old Goddaughter to say "existential dread." The bishop asked how she was doing, she said "existential dead," the bishop totally lost it with hysterical laughter
None of them ever panned out, the fucking lazy old god bastards.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [EXISTENTIAL LOUD CONURE SCREAMING]
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: End of my rope time.
item.description: I'm not trying to be egotistical, but I'm a damn good spouse, and I love them a ton. Not just in words, but in actions too. I kept us afloat during the pandemic when they lost their job, I clean, cook all the meals, work full time, manage all the bills and home maintenance, and am actively losing weight and getting in better shape. My spouse gets frustrated and their lack of results, ignores nutrition, sits all day, won't reciprocate affection, is annoyed when i interrupt them doom scrolling, can no longer share a bed, won't cook, can't/won't clean any of their messes, etc, etc....Maybe not all of these things every day, but they are all there more often than not. Just venting.
item.dc:creator: dooker83

item.dc:creator: mariadmccormick

item.title: AuDHD memes and such
item.description:
Got all the fun diagnoses in my 30s
.
I try though?
Me in therapy still trying to get at the core issues, years later
One good thing about my divorce: I don't have to tone myself down for him/his friends anymore :)
^actual photo of me
.
:)
I had a 15-minute interaction with a stranger and tried to seem "normal" (or otherwise not weird/anxious). When the conversation ended, I felt completely depleted. I know it's better/easier/less exhausting if I just... be myself. But rejection is exponentially worse than burnout, so... :D
:D:D
.
Acceptance is key?
yes
I touch.
I know we're against selfies here, sorry :P
kitty
lol
friends?
.
.
This spring, I started putting some of my photography onto journals and selling them on Etsy.
My cat comforts me daily. I try to comfort her too. She's old and has a hard time walking now. I have ramps and step-stools around the apartment. And I keep a soft jacket next to my chair, so that whenever she wants up on my lap, she can enjoy some biscuit-worthy snuggles. I love her.
Also cats.
yes
You make. I buy.
Weee!
but why
.
:D
but seriously, i did not consent to you touching me so please accept this light tazing in response
hypervigilance is the best x_X
It just amazes me that some people can both come up with an idea *and* execute the idea to completion. How are you both creative *and* effective like that? :P
.
.
early 2000s flashback, anyone? Anyway, have a nice day, imgurians :)
item.dc:creator: lelindepage

I did a thing.
